name: RetroZen
short_description: Iconic rides, iconic vibes! Relive the soul of the '80s with retro supercars, synthwave tunes, and endless cruises in RetroZen!
detailed_description:
Discord Server


About the Game

Get ready to relive the soul of the '80s in RetroZen!


  • Experience Iconic Cars: Cruise in over 15 iconic cars, from classics to supercars, each crafted with attention to detail and nostalgia in mind.

  • Endless Exploration: Explore tons of unique maps, from neon-filled cityscapes to trippy wormholes, each offering a distinct atmosphere and a brand-new experience.

  • Customize Your Ride: Personalize your cars to make them your own, from performance upgrades to colors, rims, and neon lights!

  • Groove to the Beat: Enjoy a curated playlist of synthwave tracks that perfectly capture the funky and fun soul of the '80s, making every drive a nostalgic journey. Each map will react differently to the music you are listening to via unique rhythm effects, immersing both you and the game in the vibe!

  • Retro Aesthetics: Experience the golden era of gaming with our various retro screen effects.

  • Endless Enjoyment: Dive into a satisfying gameplay loop with numerous upgrades, unlockable cars, and endless roads to explore, all designed for pure relaxation and endless fun.

Welcome to RetroZen, where every ride is a trip down memory lane, and every moment is soaked in the iconic vibes of the '80s!

English*, French*, Italian*, German*, Spanish - Spain*, Indonesian*, Japanese*, Korean*, Polish*, Portuguese - Portugal*, Russian*, Simplified Chinese*, Thai*, Traditional Chinese*, Turkish*, Ukrainian*
*languages with full audio support
